issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.summary: Invoice correction - PODs without correction are included in the credit and debit note

content.text: These PODs don’t have correction data but are included in the invoices:
Comment: We noticed that these PODs have billing data by profile, which is deleted in the system
synced this conversation thread with the Slack thread
. Replies in synced threads will automatically update across both Slack and Jira.
Could you change the Invoiced field for this billing data by profile, because this invoice must be generated today. After the invoice generation we can change them back to old state:
OK, I'll tell Nini to prioritize this
The invoiced status for these IDs is already set to 'Yes'. Could you please double-check and confirm?
The change is not visible yet
You're testing on the production environment, right?
Yes we need them in PROD
In test there is no records with these IDs

and the following numbers are provided:
 420447, 420844, 420424, 420485, 420828, 420848.
Are these
that were sent, or are they just
, so I would like to clarify which one they are.
As I understand it, we only need to temporarily change the status from 'Invoiced' so that it won't be included in today's billing run, right?
Yes, we have a bug (at least we think that is the issue) that takes deleted sets of data by profile in invoice correction.
